headline: Built by security experts, for security leaders
story:
Founded in 2018 by a team of former government security analysts and penetration testers, CLASP was born from a simple observation: enterprises needed cybersecurity that could keep pace with increasingly sophisticated threats.

Today, we protect over 500 organizations across 40 countries, from startups to Fortune 500 companies. Our team of certified security professionals brings decades of combined experience in offensive security, threat intelligence, and security operations.
mission: To make enterprise-grade cybersecurity accessible, proactive, and effective for organizations of all sizes.

team.name: Alex Martinez
team.bio: 15+ years in offensive security, former NSA analyst

team.name: Dr. Emily Wang
team.bio: PhD in Cryptography, published researcher in zero-knowledge proofs

team.name: Jordan Blake
team.bio: Led incident response for multiple Fortune 100 companies
